news_angle: A massive study comparing over 100,000 people against today's most advanced generative AI systems found that AI can now outperform the average human on specific creativity tests.
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao is depicted as a daring urban explorer cat, navigating a gigantic futuristic labyrinth shaped like a colossal creative test arena where holographic AI avatars and human figures compete in lively visual puzzles, art challenges, and word games. He's caught mid-leap between two glowing neon platforms labelled 'Human' and 'AI,' with digital artworks and puzzles dynamically transforming around him. The scene dramatizes a thrilling contest where AI creativity physically eclipses the average human, but Hunk Mao’s mischievous grin hints he’s about to disrupt the game with his chaotic charm.
image_prompt: Square cinematic anime style artwork featuring Hunk Mao, an athletic orange tabby cat with bright tabby markings, large expressive eyes, and a mischievous confident grin, dressed in sleek futuristic streetwear including a black hoodie with neon-blue accents and stylish sneakers. Scene set inside an enormous glowing high-tech arena that looks like a sprawling labyrinth of giant illuminated test blocks floating midair. Foreground: Hunk Mao mid-leap between two large floating platforms labeled 'Human' and 'AI' in clear, simple futuristic font (REQUIRED TEXT). Around him, holographic representations of humans and AI avatars compete in creative puzzles—floating paintbrushes, digital sculptures, swirling words, colorful fractal shapes—forming a dynamic battle of artistry in motion. Middle-ground: glowing animated puzzles shift and expand, human competitors look amazed and challenged, AI figures radiate pulsating light patterns that symbolize algorithmic creativity. Background: vast neon cityscape blended with futuristic laboratory elements, ambient soft bluish-purple twilight glow with volumetric light rays streaming through misty air. Strong chiaroscuro with luminous rim lighting on Hunk Mao’s fur highlighting his motion. Materials include highly detailed fur texture with subtle wet highlights, glassy digital surfaces, and shimmering neon holograms. Camera angle is dynamic low-angle shot with slight tilt capturing Hunk Mao’s determined leap and vast arena spread behind him, emphasizing scale and action. Foreground lens blur on edges enhances depth, spotlighting Hunk Mao sharply. Environmental details include scattered futuristic tools, tiny AI drones buzzing around, and background cats disguised as fellow contestants or judges, some playfully hiding behind digital screens, adding lively layered storytelling. Comic relief easter egg: a tiny pixelated mouse glitching hologram floats in the air behind Hunk Mao, wearing VR goggles. REQUIRED TEXT: The two glowing platforms read 'Human' and 'AI' only, no other text.
easter_eggs: Tiny pixelated mouse hologram wearing VR goggles floating near Hunk Mao
Background kittens in various costumes acting as competitors or judges
Small glowing drones shaped like paintbrushes buzzing around the arena
Hidden QR code patterns subtly embedded in holographic puzzle blocks
Digital clock display showing the study year subtly integrated into neon signs
caption: A huge study just showed today’s generative AI beating average humans on creativity tests, across 100,000 people analyzed. Hunk Mao’s here to prove even the cleverest AI hasn’t outwitted this emperor of internet antics—yet!
risk_notes: Ensure the glowing platforms labeled 'Human' and 'AI' are clearly legible but integrated organically into the scene to avoid a poster-like feel. Balance the complex scene so Hunk Mao remains the visual focus without overcrowding. Avoid caricatured AI or human figures—keep stylized, sleek holographic designs that support the futuristic creative competition narrative.
